question: What is the full name of each car maker, along with its id and how many models it produces?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id ,  count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.attr_c315cc, T1.key, COUNT(*) FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_35977a GROUP BY T1.key;
raw_response: SELECT T1.attr_c315cc, T1.key, COUNT(*) FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_35977a GROUP BY T1.key;
